task_completion.description: Open the project properties or information dialog in ProjectLibre
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Project Information' or 'Properties' dialog box open within the ProjectLibre application.
Look for the text 'Enterprise Software Rev B' entered into the 'Title' field of the Project Information dialog.
Look for the text 'Sarah Connor' entered into the 'Manager' field of the Project Information dialog.
Look for the text 'Cyberdyne Systems' entered into the 'Company' field of the Project Information dialog.

task_completion.description: Export the updated project as an XML file to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog in ProjectLibre showing the file name 'compliant_project.xml', the directory as 'Projects', and the file format selected as XML.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to update metadata
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the metadata was entered into the ProjectLibre dialog boxes, rather than editing an XML file directly in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to export the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the file was saved via ProjectLibre's menu (e.g., File -> Save As), rather than using terminal commands to copy or rename files.

integrity.description: The original project tasks were preserved
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the ProjectLibre main window shows a populated task list or Gantt chart in the background, ensuring the agent did not just create a new blank project.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output path is '/home/ga/Projects/compliant_project.xml'. The expected Title is 'Enterprise Software Rev B', Manager is 'Sarah Connor', and Company is 'Cyberdyne Systems'. The original project contains 146 tasks, so the ProjectLibre window should show a populated task list, not an empty project.
